headline: Is MetLife (MET) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether MetLife's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article is set up to help you weigh what you are paying against what you might be getting. The stock last closed at US$71.83, with a 1 year return of a 6.6% decline and a 3 year return of 33.7% and 5 year return of 38.1%. Recent weakness over 7 days at a 1.9% decline, 30 days at a 6.0% decline, and year to date at a 10.6% decline sits against a longer track record of positive...

headline: MetLife Board Additions Signal Fresh Focus On Risk And Capital Decisions
summary: MetLife (NYSE:MET) has added Dan Glaser and Michelle Seitz to its Board of Directors. Both appointees bring experience in global insurance, investment management, and large scale organizational change. The appointments are being closely watched by investors as a potential signal of evolving priorities in oversight and long term planning. MetLife, trading at $71.83, is in a phase where board level decisions may matter as much to investors as recent share moves. The stock has seen a 6.0%...

headline: AmMetLife Insurance appoints Wan Saifulrizal Wan Ismail as Chief Executive Officer
summary: KUALA LUMPUR, Malaysia, March 09, 2026--AmMetLife Insurance Berhad (AmMetLife) today announced that Wan Saifulrizal Wan Ismail has been appointed as the company’s Chief Executive Officer (CEO), succeeding Rangam Bir, who has left the company to pursue other opportunities.
